prompt: Create an image [Subject] Image 1 [Signature] In the lower right corner, a small Threads logo is placed, and above it, "CHAse" is written in small white cursive like a signature. [Subject's Pose and Expression] A captivating upper-body pose reminiscent of a mysterious goddess or a mythological archer. Holding a large, exquisitely carved golden bow, the right hand is lightly pulling the string while looking down calmly at the hand and bow. The focused yet calm and elegant expression maximizes the antique mythological atmosphere. [Subject's Outfit] Wearing a high-couture dress with colorful and three-dimensional details. The top is a heavy bronze gold metallic corset with a rough, glittering texture, while the bottom is an elegantly draped silk satin skirt in cream white. On the back, white fabric decorations shaped like angel wings rise structurally, and long ornate gold earrings and slender metal cuff bracelets on the left wrist provide mysterious points. [Hair and Makeup Details] A very long dark brown hairstyle with rich volume and romantic waves. The hair flows smoothly over one shoulder and down the back, adding classical beauty. The makeup is based on a transparent and matte skin expression suitable for soft studio lighting, with deep shaded makeup that emphasizes the features, and calm dried rose-colored nude lips. [Lighting and Direction] Sophisticated studio diffused lighting shining softly from the upper left of the subject. This light three-dimensionally illuminates the elaborate metallic texture of the corset and the outline of the brilliant golden bow, creating soft, smooth highlights on the subject's face and collarbone line. Subtle shadows are cast behind the subject's right side to give depth. [Texture and Color Mood] A fantastic contrast between the rough, hard-shining antique gold metal texture extrusion of the bow and corset and the smooth, soft satin fabric texture of the dress. The calm down-tone blue-gray color of the background harmonizes with the golden and white colors of the outfit, creating a sophisticated yet mysterious and grand fantasy pictorial mood. [Film and Camera Depth, Angle] Photographed using an 85mm telephoto prime lens at f/2.8, 1/200s, ISO 100. A front eye-level medium full shot composition to intently capture the beautiful silhouette of the subject and the elaborate form of the bow. A shallow depth of field is applied to bring the subject and ornate props into razor-sharp focus while the background is smoothly and cleanly out of focus. [Background Elements (Optional)] A minimal studio background in matte blue-gray tones with a soft gradient. In the lower right foreground, part of a classic white marble pillar structure reminiscent of a medieval or ancient Greek temple is slightly placed to add a sense of mythological space.
